meaning: n.[鱼](黑海、里海及其河流等处产的)大白鲟
examples: The MERO system in fact was one of the first space grid systems and it was introduced in the 1940s in Germany by Dr Max Mengering-hausen.
At least 90% of cervical cancer is known to be caused by papilloma viruses, and Dr zur Hausen suspects that all are.
Dr zur Hausen's work is mired in no such controversy.
